title: Post-cholecystectomy follow-up

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording clinician-entered discussion and post-treatment symptom follow-up without creating advice.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports clinician-entered post-treatment symptom and information review for post-cholecystectomy follow-up; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports recording clinician-entered discussion and post-treatment symptom follow-up without creating advice.

source.title: Gallstone disease: diagnosis and management — Recommendations

follow_up.text: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.
follow_up.rationale: Supports postoperative wound infection-sign review for post-cholecystectomy follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Operation and pathology, pain, fever, jaundice, bowel symptoms, wound and port sites, bile leak or duct injury context, laboratory or imaging results, activity and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for post-cholecystectomy follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
